entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Xule version: 3.0.30050 -

[xule.ruleDebug] Processing: DQC.US.0043.9875 - 16:03:19.827522 - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2023-roll-2025\BSAI_instance_2023_2025.xml

[xule.ruleDebug] D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2023-roll-2025\BSAI_instance_2023_2025.xml - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2023-roll-2025\BSAI_instance_2023_2025.xml

[DQC.US.0043.9875] The value of us-gaap:IncomeLossFromDiscontinuedOperationsNetOfTaxAttributableToReportingEntity with a value of -1,115,885 has the opposite sign of the concept us-gaap:IncomeLossFromDiscontinuedOperationsNetOfTax with a value of 1,115,885. The value of the income loss from discontinued operations cannot be negative and positive if the value of non controlling interests is not tagged. Please correct the signs of these elements so they are consistent or inclue the value for non controlling interests associated with discontinued operations, using the element IncomeLossFromDiscontinuedOperationsNetOfTaxAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest.
The properties of this us-gaap:IncomeLossFromDiscontinuedOperationsNetOfTaxAttributableToReportingEntity fact are: Period :2022-01-01 to 2022-12-31 Dimensions : Unit : USD
Rule Element Id:9875 Rule version: 29.0.2 - BSAI_instance_2023_2025.xml 3958

property.name: label
property.value: [Income (Loss) from Discontinued Operations, Net of Tax, Attributable to Parent]
